core_principle.statement: Project documentation is the formal memory of the engineering system.
core_principle.interpretation: Every architectural project must be fully traceable from design intent to final execution through structured documentation.

documentation_philosophy.goal: Ensure every decision, change, and execution step is recorded as part of a controlled system
documentation_philosophy.anti_concept: Reject informal, unstructured, or non-engineered documentation

documentation_structure.system_flow: Concept → Design → Engineering → System Definition → Manufacturing → Execution → Verification → Closure
documentation_structure.rule: Each stage must produce structured documentation artifacts

core_document_types.name: Project Brief Document
core_document_types.purpose: Capture architectural intent and client requirements

core_document_types.name: System Definition Document
core_document_types.purpose: Convert design into modular engineering system

engineering_traceability_rules.rule_3: All changes must reference system version
engineering_traceability_rules.rule_4: Execution must match documented engineering model
engineering_traceability_rules.rule_5: Final output must be fully traceable

system_integration.product_system_link: All products must map to system definitions
system_integration.execution_system_link: All installation steps must follow documentation
system_integration.design_system_link: All designs must originate from structured documentation

format_standards.format: Modular documentation blocks with clear hierarchy
format_standards.visual_logic: Grid-aligned diagrams and structured tables preferred

quality_control.rule: No project can be closed without full validation pass

user_perception: This is a structured engineering organization

strategic_goal.objective: Create full traceability of architectural engineering projects
strategic_goal.outcome: Position AvizSazeh as a system-driven engineering authority with full documentation control
